column76: Information (CE-A): The customer asked whether emergency balance is available for a postpaid SIM. However, the CM provided incorrect information by stating that GP postpaid customers cannot avail of the emergency balance facility. The correct information is that emergency balance is available for eligible Consumer Postpaid customers who meet all three conditions: they must be Consumer Postpaid subscribers, be on a STAR package, and have an available credit limit below BDT 30. Eligible customers receive BDT 150 for Platinum & Signature, BDT 120 for Gold, and BDT 70 for Silver. To avail of the emergency balance, the customer needs to dial 1211*3#, and the validity of the balance is 3 days (activation day + 2 additional days).
